tab_content.flavor_notes:
{"type":"root","children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","value":"Here at Teeccino, we couldn’t be more excited to be launching our 2 new blend families: Mushoom Adaptogen Blends and Prebiotic SuperBoost™ Blends. I began work on them the summer of 2019 after having their concept on the drawing board for a couple of years. Sometimes it just takes awhile to bring creative ideas into reality! It couldn’t have been more timely though to have these wellness blends emerge just as the coronavirus caused a worldwide pandemic.

Wellness mushrooms and herbs classified as “adaptogens” are made for this time of increased stress that puts our immune systems at risk. Enjoy tasting these new blends while learning about the health benefits of mushrooms such as Reishi, Turkey Tail, Chaga, Lion’s Mane, Tremella and Cordyceps which I’ve paired with adaptogenic herbs like Eleuthero, Astragalus, Rhodiola, Tulsi, Ashwagandha and Schisandra. There’s lots to discover along with both new and familiar flavors like French Roast, Toasted Maple, Butterscotch Cream, Rose, Cardamom and Cinnamon Berry.

Prebiotic SuperBoost™ increases the prebiotic impact of a cup of Teeccino with 2 prebiotic concentrates: vegan GOS, the prebiotic in mother’s milk that nurtures our newborn digestive system, and organic XOS, found in many plant fibers that optimizes your gut’s probiotics. Both have been studied extensively for the beneficial impacts they have on our health. Taste a new departure from classic coffee flavors: Mango Lemon Balm, a fruity lift that combines both tea and coffee notes. If you love Teeccino’s nut flavors, you’re going to really love savoring the richness of buttery macadamia nut essence with the slight sweetness from dates and figs. For the most chocolaty flavor of Teeccino to date, Dark Chocolate with cacao nibs really delivers that luscious chocolate hit to delight your taste buds.

Our mission at Teeccino is to bring the highest quality, organic ingredients to your cup that promote optimal health along with tasting pleasure. These new blends fulfill our quest better than ever!"}]}]}
